items.title: The Old Peace: Hotfix 41.0.7
items.summary:
Missed Note from 41.0.6:

  • Fixed Skin-specific armor not being removed when equipping a different armor piece in its slot.

Changes:

  • Made further improvements to Void Cascade spawns, especially when playing solo.
  • Removed the Spinnerex and Kestrel from being usable in Conclave, as they are not balanced for this gamemode.
  • Remastered various Hex kiss cinematics and the Table for Two cinematic in The New War to use new Drifter faces.

The Devil’s Triad KIM Changes and Fixes:
This hotfix brings a wide array of fixes and changes to address pain points in The Devil’s Triad KIM progression. Outside of the fixes, there are additional behind-the-scenes adjustments to help players who get “stuck” in conversations with certain Protoframes. 

Many of these notes are vague to avoid spoilers so it may be unclear if these fixes apply to you — regardless, we’ve tried to cover as many issues that we could find:

  • Updated Roathe's profile notes to be less confusing if players are Anathema after being Trusted.
  • Fixed players not being able to reunite the family if they missed a certain conversation with Roathe when he was Close. 
    • We've added a similar conversation for those at Best Friends / Loved Rank so they can trigger this event.
    • Also added a conversation to Lyon at Best Friends to address other cases of players being in a failstate for the Reunion.
  • Fixed players being able to date Roathe without hitting the requirements, causing them to be Best Friends while also in a Romance.
    • Players in this state will have their Rank reverted to Close and will see an Anathema label in his Profile to indicate that key checkpoints have not been reached. If you are affected by this, we recommend spending more time in Descendia, or speak to Marie or Lyon for assistance.
  • Fixed missing response options in a KIM Chat with Roathe, leaving the Drifter to only reply [end].
  • Fixed a case of one of Roathe's conversations not starting while Close.
  • Fixed Roathe's profile notes not being updated properly if players moved him out of Anathema, causing players to think they needed to reset when they didn't need to.
    • This hotfix has shipped an account update to clear the incorrect note for players in this state.
  • Fixed an edge-case of Lyon not speaking to players if they managed to get enough Chemistry to skip from Friendly to Trusted with Marie.
  • Fixed Lyon's rank sometimes changing to Friendly once he has agreed to a Romance. 
    • Players in this state should see their rank update properly to Close or Loved (depending on your Chemistry). 
  • Fixed Marie missing default profile notes while Trusted, which was leading to some  confusion.
  • Fixed Marie sending players to talk to Roathe despite that conversation not being available, resulting in a dead-end.
  • Fixed Marie mentioning meeting Otak too early in a KIM conversation.
  • Fixed various typos and made minor copy tweaks in The Devil's Triad KIM chats.
  • Fixed Loid missing his glasses and issues with Roathe's clothes in the reunion cinematic.
  • Fixed various map holes in Marie's Room Captura scene.
    • Also fixed decorations remaining floating in-place if the furniture they were placed on were destroyed in Marie's Room Scene.
  • Fixed an animation pop in Roathe's kiss cinematic.

Top Fixes:

  • Fixed players not receiving rewards from the third mission in Deep/Temporal Archimedea.
    • This was the result of unclaimed Challenges resetting Personal Modifiers when accessing the Archimedea screens, causing Reward Points in the UI to not match the actual Reward Points earned from completing the Archimedea missions. 
  • Fixed loss of function for Mesa if she had Mesa's Waltz equipped and cast Peacemaker while her secondary weapon was active, then used Transference.
  • Fixed Tellurium dropping in Recall: Hunhullus missions in The Perita Rebellion.
    • This was an unintended effect of the Archwing portion of the fight. We have removed this resource as it is not lore consistent for this mission.
    • Also fixed dropships dropping Circuits in a specific tile in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed missing facial animations and romance-specific voice lines for Roathe, Lyon, and Marie's Gemini skins.
  • Fixed killing a boss in Descendia during their intro cinematic causing the Infernum to be progression stopped.
  • Fixed one of Marie's abilities being able to instantly kill Roathe in Descendia, causing his fight to be progression stopped.
  • Fixed being unable to use Helminth Invigoration Overrides.
  • Fixed summoning a Heavy Weapon twice in one mission resulting in function loss.
  • Fixed the "Flawless" and "Survival" Nightwave Acts not properly tracking progress.

Warframe, Focus, and Weapon Fixes:

  • Fixed Naramon's Lethal Levitation not functioning for Clients.
  • Fixed Atlas not receiving bonus Rubble when punching a Petrified enemy with Landslide.
  • Fixed Uriel being dragged to the ground when flying in Infernalis on the Cambion Drift.
  • Fixed Gulphagor targeting enemies that could latch onto players (ex: Maggots), thereby causing latch-ception.
  • Fixed Oberon's Hallowed Reckoning not affecting ragdolled enemies.
  • Fixed Banshee's Silence causing Roathe to freeze if cast while he was mid-special attack in Descendia.
  • Fixed various issues caused by casting Abilities while grappling to an Anchor in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed Gyre Prime, Alternox Prime, and Kestrel Prime not being prioritized over their non-prime versions in Teshin's Cave offerings in Duviri.
  • Fixed players becoming permanently invisible if they cast their Tauron Strike in a specific way.
  • Fixed the Nidri Tauron Strike description in the Vazarin Focus Upgrade menu incorrectly listing duration at 30s instead of 20s.

Quest Fixes:

  • Fixed certain Quest transmissions not playing when generic transmissions are disabled (notably Alad V's opening dialogue in The Second Dream).
  • Fixed players not having enough Stormbringers to Dissolve in The Teacher Quest if they dissolved 2 and then relogged immediately after, resulting in a progression stop.
  • Fixed a loss of function if new players entered the Codex via the Update Screen menu during Vor's Prize.
  • Fixed the Typholyst being able to jump out of the map in The New War, causing the quest to become progression stopped.
  • Fixed the Murex missing in a cinematic during Veso's segment of The New War quest.
  • Fixed Darvo briefly flashing on-screen during the Purge sequence in The War Within quest.
  • Fixed pathing issues with Sentient boarding parties in The New War quest.
  • Fixed players being able to skip Itzam's quiz in The Old Peace quest.
  • Fixed various issues relating to the Somatic Bearers mechanic in The Old Peace quest.
    • Fixed SFX not playing when returning to the standing position.
    • Fixed VFX from creating a Memory not spawning from the correct location.
    • Fixed buff VFX lingering during cinematic moments and when combat ends.
    • Fixed Excalibur Prime holding an invisible weapon when exiting the Somatic Bearers menu.
  • Fixed a Prime Grineer t-posing in a segment of The Old Peace quest.

Fixes:

  • Fixed Clients not seeing certain boss health bars in Descendia.
  • Fixed players being stuck outside of the H-09 Efervon Tank arena if the fight was triggered while they were dead and they revived after it began.
  • Fixed orbs not properly being destroyed for Clients in the Archwing segment of the Hunhulls fight, causing them to suffer additional radial attacks.
  • Fixed cases of Teshin's transmissions appearing in Steel Path Descendia after a Host Migration.
  • Fixed two bosses spawning in Descendia following a host migration.
  • Fixed shoulder armor offsets not matching between Valkyr Heirloom's left and right arms.
  • Fixed Roathe's haircut disappearing when entering Void Mode as the Operator/Drifter.
  • Fixed Ivara's Artemis Bow Alternative Fire stat listing a string path instead of the intended term.
  • Fixed Insign Armor Challenge descriptions being cut off after a comma in the Arsenal.
  • Fixes towards issues when two players access the Tektolyst Artifact upgrade screen in a squad while in the Simulacrum.
  • Fixed a script error if players were in the Blessing screen for Lyon or Marie while their squadmates progressed to the next Inferum in Descendia.
  • Fixed a script error caused by the Shrine Defense objective in Descendia.
  • Fixed a script error related to the refresh rate setting.
  • Fixed unowned TennoGen items being listed in Look Links on non-Steam launchers. Now, they will not appear like other items that are unavailable.

For list of known issues that are on our radar, visit our dedicated thread: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1478410-known-issues-the-old-peace/

items.title: The Old Peace: Hotfix 41.0.6
items.summary:
Changes:

  • Adjusted Jade's Glory on High VFX to work better with the "Reduce Teammate Visual Effects" setting, and reduced some of the brighter elements following community feedback.
  • Temporarily removed Techrot Upsurge and Volatile Techrot modifiers from spawning in certain Hex Bounties as they could prevent Extraction.
  • Polished some camera transitions in a later stage of The Old Peace quest.

Top Fixes:

  • Fixed being unable to ask Roathe to date in La Cathédrale.
  • Fixed Roathe being permanently ragdolled by Voruna's Ulfrun's Descent, causing his fight in Descendia to become progression stopped.
  • Fixed being unable to complete the "Catch one fish, mine one gem or metal, and kill one enemy in 30 seconds" Riven Challenge.
  • Tentative fix for continued Netracell spawning issues for players who frequently swapped between Operator and Warframe.
    • This also addresses a similar issue where enemies would not spawn in Void Cascade.
  • Fixed Railjack Crew, On-Call Crew, Specters, and Rescue targets getting stuck in a floating horizontal stance.
  • Fixed Marie swapping from Close to Anathema if players ran out of conversations with her at this rank.
    • We revised the number of conversations needed to progress to the next rank, and made it easier to unlock opportunities to earn more Chemistry with her at this rank.
      • Additionally, we’ve made it easier to unlock opportunities to earn more Chemistry with Lyon and Roathe at Close Rank as well, to avoid a similar issue occurring with them.
    • If you were stuck in this state, you should be able to progress with Marie once more!
  • Fixed using a Tauron Strike during Titania's Razorwing causing future casts of Razorwing to break.
  • Fixed an unholy Drifter / Operator hybrid appearing at the start of The Duviri Paradox quest if players have not yet completed The New War.
  • Fixed the Amanata's passive no longer re-rolling its buff every 30 hits.

Fixes:

  • Fixed getting stuck on Marie's Infernum in Descendia if you spoke to her just as your Squad descended into the next Infernum.
  • Fixed the HUD buff indicator for Uriel's Remedium not displaying the ability name.
  • Fixed cases of players not receiving the Kavat Genetic Codes or Power Cores if they already owned some when purchasing the Vasca Kavat Kit.
    • We will be running a script for affected players post-hotfix!
  • Fixed the Vinquibus' custom reticle disappearing in a stage of The Old Peace quest.
  • Fixed breakable items in a later stage of The Old Peace quest being broken without Infernalis being properly cast.
  • Fixed a case of Cross Platform Save accounts being able to apply multiple Invigorations via the Helminth.
  • Fixes towards spot-loading when opening the Pause menu if players have an active Adversary.
  • Fixed the Roathe and Marie Gemini Emotes not using custom energy colours.
    • Also fixed Marie's Gemini emote VFX being very bright for squadmates.
  • Fixed various edge-cases related to The Devil’s Triad KIM conversations:
    • Fixed Loid not actually completing a certain promised action even if players successfully triggered it.
    • Fixed Marie appearing to type endlessly in a certain KIM conversation.
    • Fixed a dialogue tree choice in one of Lyon’s KIM conversations causing him to become softlocked.
    • Fixed being able to confess to lying to Marie despite never having done so.
    • Fixed a case of Roathe incorrectly accusing you of doing a certain action that you definitely did not do.
    • Fixed being bounced between Lyon and Roathe if Roathe is waiting for you to complete a certain objective for him.
    • Fixed a rare case of being able to date all three members of The Devil's Triad at once. If we wanted that to be possible, we'd call them The Devil's Thruple instead.
    • Fixed various minor typos and an instance of confusing dialogue in KIM conversations with The Devil's Triad.
  • Fixed Teshin transmissions being able to play during Shrine Defense stages in Descendia on The Steel Path.
  • Fixed the Operator being able to break into La Cathédrale if they fast travelled in the transition area between the Necralisk and Sanctum Anatomica.
  • Fixed a black screen appearing if players entered the Focus Upgrade menu from the Arsenal and quickly exited out.
  • Fixed the newly-unequipped weapon slot in the Arsenal being briefly unresponsive after unequipping the Vinquibus.
  • Fixed the Tenens X Kalika challenge being completable with any version of The Fragmented boss fight, instead of The Fragmented One as intended.
  • Fixed a floating turret in The Perita Rebellion missions.
  • Fixed a case of Lettie letting the Drifter rizz themself up instead of her.
  • Fixed suffix Honoria causing minor UI clipping issues.
  • Fixed Peculiar Audience's SFX not playing for squadmates.
  • Fixed the Power Core's description stating it can be earned from the Mars Junction when it is now earned from the Mercury Junction.
  • Fixed minor inconsistencies with value color tags (ex: green for a positive stat change) in Descendia Blessing descriptions.
  • Fixed a script error when attempting to start the Angels of Zariman quest.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Nokko's Sporespring.
  • Fixed a script error when related to the minimap when in Grendel's Pulverize.

For list of known issues that are on our radar, visit our dedicated thread: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1478410-known-issues-the-old-peace/

items.title: The Old Peace: Hotfix 41.0.5
items.summary:
Additions:

  • Added the Insign Bundle to Roathe’s Surplus Wares in La Cathédrale.
    • This bundle contains the Insign Honoria and the Insign I Sporoi — a new evolving chest armor!
    • Like the Protovyre series of cosmetics, the Insign I Sporoi evolves as players accomplish additional challenges befitting a warrior. Evolve this new armor piece through 20 tiers of challenges and display your achievements proudly. 

Changes:

  • The "Mission Tutorial Transmissions" toggle now applies to various transmissions in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Updated Facial Accessory description to remove mention of Operator (since Drifters can use them too!).
  • Added an objective marker on a breakable item if players spend too long in the room without breaking it in a stage near the end of The Old Peace quest.

Top Fixes:

  • Fixed Railjack Crew and Specters having difficulties pathing and using context actions.
  • Fixed cases of Tektolyst resource pickups disappearing quickly when dropped by Commandeered Prime Warframes in The Perita Rebellion on Steel Path.
  • Fixed Yareli being dismounted from Merulina and losing collision when moving between tiles in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed your Warframe turning into a mutant Excalidrifter when accessing Duviri Captura scenes. 
    • They may be gone now, but they'll haunt your nightmares for years to come.
  • Fixed being unable to pick up the Sagek Prime after being disarmed.
  • Fixed Vinquibus' passive counter always remaining empty for Clients.

The Dark Refractory Changes & Fixes:

  • Fixed Roathe being a sore loser and still going ahead with punching your ever-loving guts out even if you literally crucified him to the wall with an energy stapler mere moments ago. 
    • Translation of the programmer note: Fixed Roathe being able to use one of his special attacks when he is tied to the Throne if it started charging before you killed him.
  • Fixed players with loaner Archwing gear in the Hunhullus fight entering the Archwing stage without a weapon if they died earlier in the fight.
  • Fixed players being stuck in Archwing if they respawned after the Hunhullus fight ended in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixes:
  • Fixed Titania's Razorflies targeting aggressive Conservation targets (like Predasites).
  • Fixed inconsistent Enemy Highlighting during a segment of The Old Peace quest.
  • Fixed various offset issues with the Dax Lustratus Shoulder Armor.
  • Fixed VFX issues for Wisp's Solgate if cast with the Marie Gemini Skin equipped.
  • Fixed being unable to select the Sunrise and Beach Kavat Floofs after placing them as a decoration.
  • Fixed walking through the Heurodis Decoration causing the camera to clip into your Warframe.
  • Fixed various minor UI positioning issues in Varzia's Prime Resurgence screen.
  • Fixed a few more typos in The Devil's Triad KIM chats.
  • Fixed the Dactolyst missing an icon in the Codex.
  • Fixed various softlocks when opening Dioramas.
  • Fixed a crash in Sanctuary Onslaught.

For list of known issues that are on our radar, visit our dedicated thread: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1478410-known-issues-the-old-peace/

items.title: The Old Peace: Hotfix 41.0.4
items.summary:
Tauron Strike Charging Changes & Fixes:

  • “Equip a Focus Lens” Pop-Up Changes and Fixes:
    • This feature was released in 41.0.3, but not in a fully polished state. The following changes and fixes should make it less obtrusive!
      • The pop-up will now only display once when a player opens their Arsenal. 
        • Also reduced the time the pop-up will linger on the screen.
      • Improved logic of the pop-up so it refreshes on weapon swap.
      • Fixed the pop-up appearing if a player's Heavy Weapon or Amp has a Focus Lens installed.
      • Fixed the pop-up appearing on accounts without an equipped Tektolyst Artifact.
      • Fixed the pop-up not clearing when opening additional menus.
  • Tauron Boost Convergence Orb Fixes:
    • For context, these are the Convergence Orbs that appear once a player has hit their Daily Focus Cap.
    • Fixed the Tauron Boost Convergence Orb icon not being blue.
    • Fixed Tauron Boost Convergence Orbs inconsistently spawning for Clients if they are at their Daily Focus Cap. 
    • Fixed Tauron Boost Convergence Orb pop-up not giving the correct amount of Tauron Strike Charge (was 10%, now 20%) if players were at their Daily Focus Cap.
      • Also adjusted the Tauron Strike Charge multiplier so they match base Convergence Orbs.
    • Fixed timing spawn logic for the Tauron Boost Convergence Orb not being consistent with the base yellow Convergence Orbs.

Changes:

  • Added a "Swap Now" option to the pop-up when attempting to enter La Cathédrale as Operator. 
  • Adjusted the tint channels on the Dax Lustratus Shoulder Armor so metals are on the Accent channel, following community feedback.
    • Known Issue: we received similar feedback about Marie and Roathe’s attachments on their Gemini Skins, and the Grand Carnus Reglia, which we will be addressing in the future.
  • Updated various bundle names to remove specific Operator/Drifter terms if the cosmetics are usable on both.
  • Removed lava in Roathe's spawn room in Descendia as players could die by it and cause the mission to become progression stopped.
  • Improved cases of bosses spawning too close to walls or corners in Descendia, which sometimes caused camera issues for their spawn-in cinematics.

Top Fixes:

  • Fixed Commandeered Prime Warframes not appearing if players completed the Order before they had a chance to spawn in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed Uriel's Infernalis and Brimstone not triggering Arcane Hot Shot for Clients.
    • This was because the damage for Clients wasn't being considered Ability Damage, also causing damage numbers to not match the appropriate tint as well.
  • Fixed Roathe's Infernum missing the "Descend" button if the UI scale is set below a certain threshold in the Descendia mission start screen.
  • Fixed a case of players being able to equip a Primary Weapon with the Vinquibus in the Melee Weapon slot.
  • Fixed Roathe missing Arcane Consequence in his Marks of Valor store.
  • Fixed the ! notification not appearing on the POM-2 when The Devil's Triad and The Roundtable Protoframes have new KIM conversations available.
  • Fixed Companions disappearing after a Kaithe Infernum in Descendia.
  • Fixed the Thermian RPG Penance allowing them to be spawned endlessly in Descendia.
  • Fixed various offset issues for the Dax Lustratus Shoulder Armor.

The Dark Refractory Fixes:

  • Fixed Pressure Gauge objective in Descendia spawning its ideal pressure at the same points every time, instead of being dynamically generated.
  • Fixed Initiative Buff pop-up appearing in Host's language for Clients in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed cases of Blessing descriptions using Host language for Clients in Descendia.
  • Fixed a case of function loss for Operator if Last Gasp is unlocked and they die in the Prime Vanguard fight in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed players having a permanent white screen if they entered Last Gasp in a Descendia floor with Kaithes. 
    • This also addresses other situations of Last Gasp not working correctly if it is triggered after players completed an Infernum with a vehicle (ex: Kaithes).
  • Tentative fix towards cases of Clients being unable to use Tauron Strikes in The Perita Rebellion if accessed via Mission Preview.
  • Fixed a hitch caused by Nekros' Shadows of the Dead when moving between Infernums in Descendia.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Lyon's "Ascetic Munitions" blessing in Descendia.
  • Fixed a script error when attempting to use Abilities against the Hunhullus.

Fixes:

  • Fixed Vexoric's spectral blades not functioning properly if the Tauron Strike was cast by a squadmate.
    • Also fixed the spectral blades not matching the tints of the cast Vexoric.
  • Fixed a hitch at the start of the Dactolyst fight in The Old Peace quest.
  • Fixed Character Highlights applying to a few cinematics in The Old Peace.
  • Fixed cases of screenshake lingering after the "Too Far" segment in The Old Peace quest.
  • Fixed a character unintentionally having Protea's Temporal Anchor VFX when rewinding in The Old Peace quest.
  • Fixed performance issues caused by the Akarius with Arcane Pistoleer equipped.
  • Fixed Operator not looking at the camera at the end of the “Table for Two” scene in The New War.
  • Fixed Eskhatos Ki'teer Ephemera unintentionally highlighting eyes and mouths on Drifters/Operators and Gemini skins.
  • Fixed incorrect offset of the Vanda Prime Chest armor when equipped on Drifter.
  • Fixed your Drifter not appearing if active when viewing your own profile.
  • Fixed players being able to lead Marie to repeat herself endlessly in a KIM conversation. 
    • If you're someone who made use of this bug, your chat history with her may be a little broken as a result. Only fair, considering what you put her through.
  • Fixed Founders Honoria inbox messages being sent from Ordis instead of Roathe.
  • Fixed some typos and minor grammatical errors in The Devil's Triad KIM conversations.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Uriel's Brimstone.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Vythelas' Runes.
  • Fixed a script error in the Tektolyst Artifact upgrade screen.

For list of known issues that are on our radar, visit our dedicated thread: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1478410-known-issues-the-old-peace/

items.title: The Old Peace: Hotfix 41.0.3
items.summary:
Operation: Blood of Perita 
Our latest Operation: Blood of Perita begins today (December 16) at 11:30am ET! To participate in this Operation, you must have completed The Old Peace quest. 

For more information on how to participate, check out our official Operation Forum Post.

Changes:

  • Updated various descriptions to better explain Tauron Strikes and their mechanics:
    • Updated Tauron Strike Focus node descriptions to add duration and enhance overall clarity.
    • Added clarification on how Tauron Strike charge is gained in the on-hover tooltip in the Tektolyst Artifact Upgrade screen.
      • As a reminder, Tauron Strike Charge can be gained by killing enemies, with or without Focus Lenses equipped (Lenses boost charge amount), and by picking up Convergence Orbs (which give you a base amount of charge on pickup and buff the charge rate from killing enemies for 45s). 
    • Players with a Tektolyst Artifact for their active Focus School will now see a pop-up in the Arsenal if a Lens is not installed on any item in their Loadout.
      • This pop-up explains that installed Lenses will charge their Tauron Strikes significantly faster!
    • Renamed “Persistent Effect” to “Temporary Effect” to indicate they have a limited duration.
    • Related Fixes:
      • Fixed the Spectral Pages Focus node giving +0% increased value per rank instead of the intended +10%. Also clarified that they grant base +10% Cast Speed, Strength, and Duration.
      • Fixed Overwhelming Power Focus node missing the "Warframe/Operator" category in the on-hover description.
  • Made various tweaks to Vinquibus' SFX.
  • Adjusted various cosmetic descriptions to remove specific mention of Warframes or Operators if those items can also be equipped by the Drifter. 

Top Fixes:

  • Fixed various cases of players being in a broken state after the transition to the Archwing Stage of the Hunhullus fight.
    • We are still investigating edge-cases, but this fix should address the most common causes of this bug.
  • Fix an issue where the Drifter shown in kiss cinematics might not match your actual Drifter.
  • Fixed Lyon Allard's "Sacred Annihilation" Blessing applying to Melee weapons and Damage Over Time effects.
    • Also fixed it being able to insta-kill Invulnerable targets and Bosses.
  • Fixed the "Find Hidden Ground Scanners" Order becoming progression stopped if players destroyed a mine too early in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed Yareli being unable to complete various Orders in The Perita Rebellion while on Merulina.
  • Fixed Primary Bulwark's bonus applying to all weapons, instead of only your Primary.
  • Fixed Oraxia's fight Honoria not being awarded to Clients.
  • Fixed a bug where Primary Overcharge would calculate infinite multishot.
  • Fixed the Entrati Syndicate having an unintentional Mastery Rank 9 requirement as a result of the Keratinos Blueprint sacrifice.
    • We've swapped the required sacrifice to ONE Keratinos Blade Blueprint, so players still have less to farm than originally!
  • Fixed cases of Clients being teleported to a previous hacking terminal if they encounter multiple hacking objectives in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed players not being teleported into Roathe's boss arena if they were outside of it when the fight is triggered.
  • Fixed Uriel not triggering Archon Intensify when healing his Demons.
  • Fixed Arcane Irradiate triggering recursively off of Cyte-09's Resupply elemental ammo.
  • Fixed Zid-An Uskos' heat buff not applying to Exalted Secondary Weapons.
  • Fixed Uriel's Demon Vythelas' heat damage buff being permanent, instead of properly clearing once the Demonium buff has expired.

The Dark Refractory Changes & Fixes:

  • Improved the visibility of the mines in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Lyon and Marie's names now appear over their heads when you look at them in Defense missions in Descendia.
  • Fixed being able to survive one of Roathe's abilities if players were using Transference.
    • Also fixed one of Roathe's abilities not instantly killing players when hit.
  • Fixed entering a new Infernum and then dying as Operator/Drifter in Descendia causing players to spawn in the previous Infernum where their Warframe was last used.
  • Fixed breaking all the tumors too quickly causing the Hive mission to become progression stopped in Descendia.
  • Fixed kills that occur outside of the objective tile causing Authorization Codes to spawn far away in the Makvoss Cannon objective in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed an issue where the Auroch Supply Vehicle would have an incorrect amount of health in the rare case the objective is rolled more than once during The Perita Rebellion.
    • Also adjusted the Auroch Supply Vehicle's speed to be more consistent across levels.
  • Fixed Orokin dropships not having collision in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed only one player in a squad being able to receive the Exorcist Honoria in Descendia.
  • Fixed being able to Fast Travel during The Devil's Triad introductory cinematic, causing various UI to overlap.
  • Fixed Clients not seeing Transference UI elements after a Host Migration in The Perita Rebellion if they are using the Mission Preview feature.
  • Fixed an incorrect exploding barrel mesh appearing in certain tiles in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed a resource crate being stuck inside a rock in a tile in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Commandeered Volt Prime if its target dies mid-cast of his Shock ability.
  • Fixed a small hitch when Commandeered Ash Prime spawns in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Nokko's Sprodling form in Descendia.
  • Fixed a rare crash in The Perita Rebellion.

Cosmetic Fixes:

  • Fixed various VFX issues for the Dax Weapon Skins, including missing VFX, incorrect colors applying to the VFX, and missing textures.
  • Fixed Clan Sigils not displaying the custom icon when equipped on Operators or Drifters.
  • Fixed the Eskhatos Kiteer Ephemera not applying this VFX to player helmets.
  • Fixed emissive tints not properly applying to Operator/Drifter attachments.
  • Fixed Drifter's face morphing when toggling the Grand Carnus Hood opened and closed.
  • Fixed being unable to change the textures on Operator/Drifter Voidshell Suits.

Fixes:

  • Fixed Magus and Emergence Arcanes being displayed like Mods if obtained from Arcane Dissolution.
  • Fixed Uriel's demons targeting wildlife and other neutral-faction entities. Attacking Pobbers willy-nilly is a level of evil even Uriel can't withstand.
  • Fixed Nullifier bubbles having collision for player cameras.
  • Fixed the "Play All Dialogues" setting not being registered until a player had logged out of the POM-2, possibly causing them to miss KIM conversations.
  • Fixed Amp stats incorrectly being categorized as Primary in the Tektolyst Artifact upgrade screen.
  • Fixed missing La Cathédrale portal when returning to the Sanctum Anatomica from a mission.
  • Fixed new players hearing The Dark Refractory mission countdown SFX in regular Navigation.
  • Fixed Character Highlighting applying to certain cutscenes in The Old Peace quest.
  • Fixed being able to Slash Dash into the Makvoss Cannon during The Old Peace quest.
  • Fixed a case of Adis spawning in the ceiling in a mission during The Old Peace quest.
  • Fixed the elevator not moving if a player used Transference right after activating it during The Old Peace quest.
  • Fixed Nef Anyo's beard not lighting up during transmissions in Deepmines Bounties.
  • Fixed offset icons in Varzia's Prime Resurgence menu.
  • Fixed the Tau Dax Rifle Skin playing Incarnon SFX when swapping between firing modes.
  • Fixed Oraxia's footstep SFX not playing during Silken Stride.
  • Fixed a case of Lettie's KIM Profile Notes indicating that she was dateable but also not dateable at the same time. Schrodinger's kiss!
  • Fixed Somachord Tones being able to spawn in The Old Peace Captura scenes.
  • Fixed a method of being able to bypass purchase limits in Baro Ki'Teers wares.
  • Fixed the Mara Detron being listed as a Primary weapon in Baro Ki'Teer's wares.
  • Fixed various minor typos in KIM and Vendor dialogues with The Devil's Triad.
  • Fixed broken tag in the Flowing Slayer buff HUD description.
  • Fixed a script error caused when activating a Tauron Strike.
  • Fixed a crash when viewing the Dactolyst in the Codex.
  • Fixed spotloading caused by Sevagoth Specters when they cast Exalted Shadow.
  • Fixed a rare crash when using a beam weapon.

For list of known issues that are on our radar, visit our dedicated thread: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1478410-known-issues-the-old-peace/

items.title: The Old Peace: Hotfix 41.0.2
items.summary:
Missing Note from The Old Peace:

  • Added six Lunar New Year Decorations to the Dojo!

The Perita Rebellion Boss Changes and Fixes:

  • Fixed The Perita Rebellion bosses not scaling properly with Steel Path modifiers.
    • These enemies died really quickly despite being the “finale” of the mission. We have fixed Steel Path modifiers not applying to them, and tweaked their Steel Path health values to ensure their difficulty matches what is expected at this level of content. 
    • With the tweaks to the Hunhullus, Archguns have been buffed in the Archwing Stage to keep the time-to-kill consistent with what it was before this change.
  • Prime Vanguard Fixes:
    • Fixed Commandeered Primes Codex entry listing resistances to all damage types (instead of only the ones they are actually resistant to).
    • Fixed an issue with Commandeered Ember Prime's Fireball casting speed in The Perita Rebellion.
    • Fixed Commandeered Volt Prime's shield blocking his own projectiles in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Hunhullus Changes and Fixes:
    • Added indicators to the Orbs that can be shot to negate the Hunhullus’ death laser ability in the Archwing stage.
    • Fixed the Hunhullus not being immune to armor stripping.
    • Fixed pre-set builds for loaner Archguns in the Hunhullus fight not properly applying, causing their damage output to be very underwhelming.
      • Known Issue: this fix only applies for Hosts, Clients are still experiencing this issue.
    • Fixed Void buff from Marrowtick grapples not displaying immediately on ammo count for Clients.
      • Also fixed the Void buff timer not refreshing with new Grapples for Clients.
    • Fixed the Hunhullus not being immune to armor stripping.

Changes:

  • General polish for Drifter Beard fit.
  • Non-boss Commandeered Prime Warframes in The Perita Rebellion now drop 2 Tektolyst resources when killed on the Steel Path.
    • They have a chance of dropping Lyroic Bridge, Ren Hypercore, or Ascaris Prime, regardless of which Recall mission you are playing. 
    • Also fixed loot abilities applying to Commandeered Prime Warframes, to keep them consistent with Acolytes.
  • Arcane Persistence’s effect is now negated by Nullifiers, Magnetic Status Effects, and other similar nullifying effects.
    • This Arcane's effect offers a powerful new playstyle for survivability, but with certain setups, players can become fully immortal with no need to engage with any of the challenges a mission presents. This wrinkle adds an extra consideration for those who might wish to AFK, but also preserves meaningful challenge against "hard mode" bosses and other late-game content.
  • Added the Harrowing Spire Stance to The Old Peace Uriel Bundle and The Old Peace Complete Collection (Platinum and paid). 
    • As mentioned in our PSA, those who had purchased these bundles before this Hotfix will be receiving the Stance in a script tomorrow. We’ll update the PSA once the script has begun. Thank you, Tenno! 

Top Fixes:

  • Fixed Sanctuary Onslaught being progression stopped if a specific tile was spawned.
  • Fixed Adis having pathing issues towards the elevator in a specific stage of The Old Peace quest, often causing a progression stop.
  • Fixed being able to use Specters, On Call Crew, and Air Support in The Perita Rebellion missions.
  • Fixed dropships no longer spawning in the Air Assault encounter in The Perita Rebellion, causing a progression stop.
  • Fixed players not receiving Honoria after completing the following objectives. Those who completed the following should see their new Honoria upon login:
    • Completing The Jade Shadows Quest
    • Dating Eleanor
    • Vanquishing a Coda
  • Fixed Kestrel Rivens not applying to Kestrel Prime.
  • Fixed various issues when attempting to access the Arsenal in a Dojo.
  • Fixed Guardian Shell preventing flight with Uriel's Infernalis ability.
  • Fixed Arcane Irradiate being triggered recursively off of Blast Status Effects.
  • Fixed Companions being unequipped after an Inferum with auto-equipped Kaithes in Descendia.
  • Fixed a progression stop in the "Free Allied Brachiolysts" encounter in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed loot abilities applying to Commandeered Prime Warframes.
  • Fixed a duplicate Sagek Prime Barrel blueprint being available in Roathe’s wares and Descendia droptables.
    • Adjusted the Blueprint cost for the existing Barrel Blueprint so they use the lowest of each listed resource.
  • Fixed missing Energy and Credit drops from enemy droptables in The Perita Rebellion.
    • Also fixed Heavy Ammo not dropping in these missions. We have added this pickup to Anarch Librators!
  • Fixed cases of Armor Motes from Unairu's Tauron Strike allowing players to bypass their Armor cap if multiple are picked up simultaneously.
  • Fixed Volatile Techrot and Techrot Upsurge modifiers preventing extraction in Hex Bounties.
  • Fixed certain Nightwave challenges not properly tracking progress.
  • Fixed hidden Tauron Nodes causing "Focus Upgrade Available" notifications appearing for players with maxed out Focus Schools (but who hadn't yet acquired a Tektolyst Artifact to unlock them).

General The Dark Refractory Fixes:

  • Fixed Steel Path mode selection in Descendia not being remembered between missions.
  • Fixed Companions being unequipped after an Inferum with auto-equipped Kaithes in Descendia.
  • Fixed an issue if Roathe's boss fight was triggered before all players were in the Arena.
    • Also addresses cases of players being locked outside of the room if it was triggered before they entered the Arena.
  • Fixed a crash for Clients when grappling a Bolkor or Firbolg in the The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed incorrect screen VFX at the end of the Roathe fight in Descendia.
  • Fixed Yareli having issues interacting with context actions while on Merulina in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed an area in The Perita Rebellion tileset where Clients could hit an invisible wall.
  • Fixed HUD disappearing if multiple players simultaneously attempted to harvest an Archon Shard from an Archon during a Descendia mission.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Lyon Allard's attacks in Descendia missions.
  • Fixed various script errors in Roathe's fight in Descendia.
  • Fixed a script error caused by host migrations in Descendia.
  • Fixed a crash when using Vazarin's Tauron Strike in Descendia.

The Old Peace Quest Changes and Fixes:

  • Added a pop-up informing players how to access The Dark Refractory after completing The Old Peace quest.
  • Removed Operator Amps from various cinematics in The Old Peace.
  • Improved transition between the quest’s final cinematics.
  • Fixed players being able to start The Old Peace quest in their Backroom through the Navigation menu.
  • Fixed players being able to leave the Dactolyst arena, resulting in a progression stop.
  • Fixed cases of players becoming progression stopped by randomly being teleported out of the objective area in various parts of the quest. We have added logic to bring you back where you belong, so you can continue with your story!
  • Uriel Changes and Fixes:
    • Removed Uriel energy cost from his section in the quest as it was causing issues.
    • Removed Uriel's ability to perform any other actions than what is intended at a stage in the quest finale, as it was causing player confusion.
    • Fixed one of the doors in The Old Peace quest not being breakable by Uriel's Infernalis.
    • Fixed missing destructible door sheen that was causing confusion and progression issues in a later stage of the quest.
    • Fixed a rare case of players falling through the world if they destroy a certain statue in just the right way.
    • Improved visibility of when to cast Brimstone, to prevent confusion.
  • Fixed Operator missing their Atmosphor in a quest stage.
  • Fixed fog flickering in the skybox of a walking segment.
  • Fixed an objective being skipped if players died at a certain section of the interrogation mission.
  • Fixes towards edge-cases of players being able to use unintended inputs in the Somatic Bearer screen.
  • Fixed being stuck as Operator if players used Transference right at the start of the interrogation mission.
  • Fixed the World-Seeder not fully rendering in until players approach it.
  • Fixed floating bodies in the Boro Overlook during the quest.
  • Fixed a script error when interacting with Somatic Bearers.

Fixes:

  • Fixed "Toggle Run" setting not being respected after leaving Uriel's Infernalis flight.
  • Fixed Arcane Bellicose showing infintely stacking Ability Strength when repeatedly hovering over Archon Shards. (this was a UI-only issue)
  • Fixed various Drifter tints not being saved in inbox kiss cinematics.
    • Also fixed purchased items not appearing in these cinematics.
  • Fixed |val| appearing in the on-hover description for Arcane Concentration.
  • Fixed cloth issues caused by Uriel's (and the Roathe Gemini skin's) tail.
  • Fixes towards resetting appearance to default twice in a row causing your Operator/Drifter's body to disappear.
  • Fixed edge-cases of certain accounts not having the Operator appearance conversion script apply properly.
  • Fixed the Zariman Green Plant, Transmutation Probe Decoration, and Heurodis Decoration having collision.
  • Fixed the new Devil's Triad Protoframes not playing dialogue when selected in the Arsenal.
  • Fixed squished Focus Icons in the Loadout Screen.
  • Fixed various offset issues on the Vanda Prime Armor Set.
  • Fixed missing Sugatra offsets for the Vinquibus.
  • Fixed NPCs repeating dialogue near the Ducat Kiosk in the Strata Relay. Imagine yapping so much you get hotfixed...
  • Fixed Madurai Paint A and B missing their item description.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Wisp's Reservoir.
  • Fixed a script error related to Madurai's Tauron Strike.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Oberon's Reckoning armor buff.
  • Fixed a script error related to one of Flare's KIM conversations.

For list of known issues that are on our radar, visit our dedicated thread: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1478410-known-issues-the-old-peace/

items.title: The Old Peace: Hotfix 41.0.1
items.summary:
The Old Peace Quest Changes and Fixes:

  • The Old Peace quest no longer requires players to read the final Inbox Message to be marked as completed.
    • If you were having issues accessing The Dark Refractory after completing the Quest, this should address it! 
  • The Old Peace quest can no longer be started from The Backroom.
    • This addresses cases of the Operator and Drifter merging into an unholy abomination when starting this quest from the Backroom. Thematically, it also makes more sense, as The Old Peace is a story about the Operator.
  • Improved Sentient pathing in stage 2 of the quest.
  • Fixed animation issues with Uriel's tail in the quest.
  • Fixed Adis not being invulnerable during missions in the quest.
  • Fixed being able to use Uriel and Operator abilities during Stage 4 of The Old Peace, as doing so could cause issues.
  • Fixed Operator being able to get stuck or move weirdly during a walking segment in the quest.
  • Fixed Excalibur Prime's attachments floating during a specific cinematic in the quest.
  • Fixed allied units having incorrect animations during a segment of the quest.
  • Fixed a duplicate transmission in stage 2 of The Old Peace quest.
  • Fixed a certain door being breakable before it was meant to be, causing a progression stop in a later stage of the quest.
  • Fixed Adis getting stuck outside an elevator in a certain stage of the quest.
  • Fixed a progression stop if you wander too far when talking to Daklo.
  • Fixed a script error when skipping a cinematic in the quest.


The Dark Refractory Changes and Fixes:

  • Fixed Roathe only using one of his special attacks in his Descendia fight.
  • Fixed Kullervo being able to summon the Atomicycle after casting Wrathful Advance in The Dark Refractory missions.
  • Fixed cases of Clients becoming permanently slowed by Narmer Deacon effects in Descendia.
  • Fixed players returning from a host migration not seeing Prime Vanguard health bars during the boss fight.
  • Fixed players who haven't completed The Archwing quest not receiving loaner Archwing items in the Hunhullus fight if they died before stage 3.
  • Fixed loss of function if Transference was spammed while transitioning to the Archwing stage of the Hunhullus fight.
  • Fixed dead players getting stuck in space if they revive during the Archwing stage of the Hunhullus fight.
  • Fixed Lyon and Marie's idle subtitles being visible despite players not being within range to hear them speak.
  • Fixed the pause menu becoming warped if it was open while a miniboss intro is triggered in Descendia.
  • Fixed Convergence Orb effect in The Perita Rebellion having a loc string in the HUD.
  • Fixed markers from The Perita Rebellion objectives remaining on-screen in the boss arena.
  • Fixed PH message appearing when attempting to start a Descendia mission at a checkpoint that one of your squadmates has not unlocked.
  • Fixed a [PH] in the Makvoss Cannon's name during The Perita Rebellion missions.
  • Fixed the "EXIT" button in The Dark Refractory screen not being localized based on the client language.
  • Fixed The Dark Refractory not being accessible immediately in the Backroom when using Mission Preview.
  • Fixed performance issues caused by a tile in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed a script error when hosts load into boss arenas during The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed a script error caused by the Hunhullus' laser attack.

Changes:

  • Improved the Vinquibus' unique Reticle to make it clearer which mode is currently active.
    • Now, the inactive side will be noticeably dimmer.
    • Also increased the thickness of the Rifle side to make it easier to see.
  • Adjusted the fit of various Drifter Suits to address proportion issues.
  • Improved eyelash appearance if players have TAA turned off in the Video Settings
  • Updated various Operator cosmetic icons to reflect remastered Operator faces.
  • Tweaked the visuals of the persistent blades spawned from Naramon's Vexoric Tauron Strike.

Top Fixes:

  • Fixed loss of function or crash when attempting to exchange bundled items at a Vendor.
    • (ex: exchanging resources at Daughter, Loid, or trying to buy Prime Resurgence packages at Varzia).
  • Fixed the On Call Crew being restricted in all missions.
    • This was fallout from restricting them from The Dark Refractory missions, but should now be restored.
    • Known Issue: while On Call Crew are restricted from Descendia, they can still be called in The Perita Rebellion.
  • Fixed Operator remaster conversion script not selecting body type based on the body type of the previously-used heads.
  • Fixed inbox kiss cinematic not being properly updated to match new Drifter aesthetics.
  • Fixed Uriel's demons not disappearing while in Archwing.
  • Fixed Arcane Circumvent triggering on enemies whose defenses were already stripped.
    • Also fixed Arcane Circumvent's description listing the incorrect duration (was 5s, now 15s).
  • Fixed Melee Careen not applying extra damage against enemies affected by Cold Status Effects.
  • Fixed a duplicate Lith L6 Relic being released with Gyre Prime. 
    • Her new Relic is now Lith L7! (... 6.... 7)
  • Fixed the Legacy Color Palette having a missing icon if players do not own the Refacia Kit.
  • Fixed the Invictus Signa (and all its variants) disappearing from player accounts.
  • Fixed Lyoric Bridge, Ascaris Prime, and Ren Hypercore item descriptions not listing their drop locations.

Fixes:

  • Fixed a case of Uriel's demons doubling after casting Remedium.
  • Fixed Madurai's Tauron Strike not applying energy color correctly.
  • Fixed Nidri teleporting into the ground when the Vazarin Tauron Strike is cast on a sloping surface.
  • Fixed the Mission Preview button not appearing in the Update Screen upon first login after installing The Old Peace.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Cyte-09's Resupply when used with the Bombastine's Malice Decree.
  • Fixed not being able to purchase the War Stories Bundle if you already owned the Klebrik Scaffold.
  • Fixed [PH] in Zid-an Osbok's buff description.
  • Fixed missing descriptions for Focus Face Paints.
  • Fixes towards the Judicial Coils accessory not attaching and animating properly when equipped on the Drifter.
  • Fixed a typo in Maphica's description.
  • Fixed a french grammar issue in Marie's first KIM dialogue. Sacre bleu!
  • Fixed the Operator blinking with their eyes closed during a segment of The War Within.
  • Fixed incorrect aspect ratio used for inbox message transmissions.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Uriel's demons trying to use abilities while he is dead. Talk about offering help from beyond the grave.
  • Fixed a script error that could occur when randomizing Operator/Drifter cosmetics.
  • Fixed a script error caused by Nokko's Reroot.
  • Fixed a script error in the Focus Equipment upgrades screen.
  • Fixed a script error when activating a Tauron Strike.
  • Fixed a rare crash on game shutdown.

For list of known issues that are on our radar, visit our dedicated thread: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1478410-known-issues-the-old-peace/

items.title: Update 41: The Old Peace
items.summary:
UPDATE 41: THE OLD PEACE

Face the Past. Shape the Future 

We could not be more elated for you to experience all that The Old Peace has to offer! This final update of 2025 sets the stage for our next major chapter with a heart-rending revisit to the past. 

Return to the battlefields of old and relive your experiences on Tau with our latest cinematic Quest: The Old Peace. Albrecht Entrati’s trail leads beyond the Origin System. Only by delving into the past can the path ahead be made clear —  but buried secrets can be deadly. 

Completing the Quest will grant you access to the Dark Refractory – a new Navigation access point to new gamemodes: The Perita Rebellion and Descendia. You can also save the Quest for later if you want to jump right into these game modes with a new experimental feature called Mission Preview! 

Relive repressed memories of the calamitous battles on Tau as the Operator in The Perita Rebellion or descend the Infernums of Roathe’s mind, wracked with memories of a violent past in Descendia.

Roathe, along with the rest of The Devil’s Triad Protoframes Marie Leroux and Lyon Allard, reside in La Cathédrale. A location somewhere in time accessible from a new portal in the Sanctum Anatomica (Deimos). They can all be talked to and romanced (if your heart desires) in the KIM system. Their Gemini Skins and Emotes are also available in the Market!

Bring the essence of the ultimate Tenno power to the battlefield! Focus has received a massive expansion in this update with the introduction of Tauron Strikes – a mighty power harnessed through the Focus Schools. Unlock Strikes by acquiring Tektolyst Artifacts, weapons summoned by the Operator and wielded by your Warframe to devastate the battlefield. 

Operators and Drifters have received a significant remaster! Every feature has had an overhaul to elevate your unique look and bring a more realistic feel to these characters. On login, you will meet your remastered Operator and Drifter with the team’s best efforts to adapt their premaster looks, which you can customize further if desired. 

There’s even more to explore in this update! Meet our 63rd Warframe Uriel, the Heretic of Xata. Shoot and slash with the Vinquibus, a new Bayonet weapon type that is both a Primary and Melee. Expand your Arsenal further with two Orokin-era Grineer weapons and 9 new Arcanes. Shock and awe with Gyre Prime Access. Earn Honoria, profile titles to wear proudly and howl at Lua with the Voruna Medeina Collection. 

And so much more including Operation: Blood of Perita which commences December 16th! We will have a dedicated Operation post once it's live explaining how you can participate. Prepare by completing The Old Peace Quest, which is the prerequisite to be able to trade Operation currency for rewards at Roathe.  

Thank you for an incredible year of Warframe! We hope you love The Old Peace as much as the DE team had making it. 

Spoiler Courtesy

While everyone will find the truth eventually, we ask that our best Tauron Academy students help preserve the mystery for fellow Tenno as they enjoy the update at their own pace. Please read our Spoiler Courtesy PSA to learn more about how you can post with best spoiler-free practices! 

Update 41 is a Mainline Update! 

Meaning that everything the team has been working on since the launch of Update 40: The Vallis Undermind is in this update (with the obvious exception of content that is not ready to be released). It is very likely, as it is with all Mainline updates, that things slip through the cracks so we will be watching for bug reports and feedback in the dedicated The Old Peace subforums to address in follow-up Hotfixes.

If any of the terms above are new to you, visit The Warframe Lexicon for Updates to learn more about Warframe’s development cycle. 

PC Download Sizes:

  • DirectX 11: ~5.30 GB
  • DirectX 12: ~6.04 GB
     

TABLE OF CONTENTS

We highly encourage you to read the entirety of The Old Peace patch notes to learn the nitty gritty that’s been wrapped into this update! But if you are looking for something in specific, simply search the following keywords to jump to its dedicated section in the spoilers below: 

Spoiler
  • New Cinematic Quest: The Old Peace 
  • Dark Refractory 
    • Mission Preview Feature
    • New Resources 
  • La Cathėdrale & The Devil’s Triad 
    • Marie Leroux
    • Lyon Allard
    • Roathe 
  • New Gamemode: Descendia 
  • New Gamemode: The Perita Rebellion
  • Focus School Expansion
    • Tauron Strikes 
    • New Focus School Nodes
    • Tektolyst Artifact Upgrades 
  • Operator & Drifter Remaster 
  • Kinemantik Messaging System Expansion: The Devil’s Triad 
  • Honoria 
  • New Warframe: Uriel 
  • New Weapons 
    • New Weapon Type: Bayonet (Vinquibus) 
    • New Orokin-Era Grineer Weapons
      • Galariak Prime
      • Sagek Prime 
  • New Arcanes 
  • Gyre Prime Access 
  • Market Additions
  • The Old Peace Uriel Bundle 
    • The Old Peace Gemini Bundle 
    • War Stories Bundle 
    • Voruna Medeina Collection
    • Tau Dax Armaments Skin Bundle 
    • Crown of Splendor Salon Pack 
    • The Devil’s Triad Community Bundle 
    • Prime Vanguard Display 
    • General Market Additions
  • Prime Vanguard Varzia Offerings (Begins December 18) 
  • Additions
  • Changes
  • Performance & Optimizations 
  • Fixes

 

Image Description: Uriel stands in proud defiance waving a yellow flag while flanked by Valdur to his left and the Sentient Adis to his right as the carnage of the war on Tau’s moon ensues. Hauntingly towering over the battlefield in the distance is the Hunhullus, a colossal Sentient weapon.

NEW CINEMATIC QUEST: THE OLD PEACE

Using Albrecht's Dark Refractory, delve deep into memories thought lost to time, memories of Tau and the fragile peace brokered between Orokin and Sentient. What happened in the past to make such bitter enemies in the present? With the help of your friend, Adis Truth-bloom, only the Tenno can uncover the real story of Tau.

Image Description: Excalibur Prime is poised in midair to fire an arrow from his bow at the face of the colossal Sentient weapon, the Hunhullus. 

During The Old Peace Quest, you’ll relive the war-torn memories of the Operator and Excalibur Prime. The latter’s usage is solely tied to the Quest and does not carry over to your Arsenal if you do not own him. It's important we continue to honor our Founders in this memory with the Prime that breathed life into Warframe. We hope you enjoy this experience! 

At certain key pivotal moments, you will come upon Somatic Bearers in the form of a spectral Excalibur Prime kneeling. This is a place to escape the horrors of war and remember that you are not alone in this fight. Tenno who have played the Quest before you may leave behind a memory here for you to call upon for aid and you too can do the same for those who come after.

The Tau levels in the quest feature new volumetric wind, an experimental system that delivers more realistic wind interactions. In the quest, this allows certain abilities and weapons to blow particles and cloth around. We will be slowly rolling this system out in the game in the future. 

Prerequisite

Complete all main quests up to and including The Lotus Eaters Quest. 

Visit our Quest Guide to help you along your journey to unlocking The Lotus Eaters Quest.

Quest Duration 

The quest can take roughly an hour and 15 minutes to complete. 

Image Description: Loid helps to support the Operator who is floating in a pool of water within the Dark Refractory. His face is full of concern as he looks down at the Operator.

Prepare Before Beginning! 

We highly recommend you complete the following check list before beginning the quest: 

  • Customize your Operator appearance 
    • We highly recommend you customize your newly remastered Operator to your liking before beginning the Quest for all of your cinematic screenshot moments! Learn more in the dedicated “Operator & Drifter Remaster” section. 
  • Activate your favorite Focus School 
    • There are moments in the Quest that utilize your current active Focus School. So be sure to have your preferred School of choice active prior to starting.
  • Prepare and customize your Loadout (Warframe, weapons, etc.)  

Quest Rewards 

Completing the Quest will reward you with the following (relevant dedicated sections are in the patch notes with more information): 

  • Inbox Message Rewards:
    • New Warframe Uriel’s Blueprint 
    • Operator Atmosphere cosmetic 
      • Worn by Operators to ensure ventilation in the hostile atmosphere of Tau. While the name states “Operator”, it can also be equipped on your Drifter! 
    • New Resources:
      • 75x Lyroic Bridge 
      • 75x Ren Hypercore
      • 75x Ascaris Prime 
  • Access to the following: 
    • The Dark Refractory and new gamemodes: Descendia and The Perita Rebellion 
    • La Cathédrale and The Devil’s Triad in the Sanctum Anatomica 
    • The Devil’s Triad KIM Expansion 
    • A new skin available for purchase in the [spoiler] customization menu in your Personal Quarters. Those who know, know!  

Image Description: Screenshot of the Dark Refractory’s UI where an Operator lies face up in a pool of water. Two options are available, The Descendia on the left and The Perita Rebellion on the right.

DISCLAIMER: This screenshot was taken on the Dev build and is not reflective of the current live events – Operation: Blood of Perita begins December 16th. 

DARK REFRACTORY

Slip deep into memories of another time and place in the Dark Refractory… Descend into the Infernums of Roathe’s mind as the Drifter in Descendia and the memories of war-torn Tau as the Operator in The Perita Rebellion. 

Upon completing The Old Peace Quest or using the Mission Preview Feature, the Dark Refractory will appear as an additional option at Navigation. This is where you access the two new gamemodes, Descendia and The Perita Rebellion. 

Image Description: Screenshot of the Dark Refractory option appearing under the Navigation option in the Orbiter. Marie (Wisp’s Protoframe) is to the left of the screenshot looking at the options.

Note: Players will not currently receive Steel Path trophies for their completion of Steel Path missions in The Dark Refractory. We aim to release these in early 2026 — thank you for your understanding and patience, Tenno!

Learn more about each gamemode in their dedicated sections below. 

Mission Preview Feature

We’re introducing a new feature with The Old Peace: the ability to preview new gameplay content immediately, regardless of Quest completion status. This preview mechanic is designed to let newer players join their friends in-mission and allow returning players to try out the latest content even if they haven’t finished all of their Quests.

This option will not skip Quests — think of it as getting a taste of The Old Peace gamemodes, where you can play with friends right away, but you’ll still need to play the main story to make use of your rewards!

To keep this balanced around that intention, it has a few caveats:

  • Players must have completed The Teacher quest before they can use Mission Preview.
  • Mission Preview players cannot publicly matchmake into Dark Refractory missions if they are below Mastery Rank 10.
  • Mission Preview players do not have access to The Devil’s Triad vendors, new Protoframe KIM chats, or any other Quest-locked content outside of the two new gamemodes (with the exception of Focus School access in The Perita Rebellion, as a preventative measure for potential issues that could arrive from Mission Preview players not having Operators).

This is an experimental feature, borne from the reality that, after 13 years, letting new and returning players jump into shiny new content is important for our longevity. Rest assured, we’ll be keeping a close eye on its implementation should any additional changes be needed.

WARNING: By previewing missions you may encounter story spoilers, and face extremely difficult gameplay intended for experienced players with fully modded, max rank weapons and Warframes. 

How to Access: The Mission Preview button is located in the Update Highlights screen, which will pop up on login. It is also accessible from the Pause Menu.

Image Description: Screenshot of the Updates Highlights screen, where details of the update are listed but the focus is on the “Mission Preview” button which is to the right of the screen underneath the “How to Play” button. 

New Resources

Whether you are stepping into your memories of Tau or delving through Roathe’s Infernums, new resources await you in The Dark Refractory.

Descendia Resources

The following are Infernum rewards which can also be acquired from containers in Descendia. 

 


Ignia — The passionate heat of flames fuels the path to redemption.

  • Currency to purchase a Descendia Arcane Collection from Roathe’s Surplus (learn more in “La Cathėdrale & The Devil’s Triad” section). 

 

Maphica — A core of rage, jealously guarded in a burnished shell.

  • Currency to purchase wares from Roathe’s Surplus store (learn more in “La Cathėdrale & The Devil’s Triad” section).

 

The Perita Rebellion Resources 

Unless otherwise specified, the resources in The Perita Rebellion drop from enemies, crates, and from completing Encounters. Learn more about this new gamemode in its dedicated section.

 


Agnovidisc — A mark of identification carried by soldiers during The Old War so that their names might be remembered if they never returned home.

  • A crafting component for new content introduced in The Old Peace.
  • Currency to purchase Tektolyst Artifact Mods and Arcanes, as well as other resources from Marie’s store (learn more in “La Cathėdrale & The Devil’s Triad” section).

 


Laudavi — Awarded to soldiers during the The Old War for distinction in battle.

  • A crafting component for new content introduced in The Old Peace.
  • Currency to purchase Tektolyst Artifact Mods and Arcanes, as well as other resources from Marie’s store (learn more in “La Cathėdrale & The Devil’s Triad” section).

 

Servoris — Medals awarded to Orokin soldiers during The Old War for acts of distinguished service.

  • A crafting component for new content introduced in The Old Peace.
  • Currency to purchase Tektolyst Artifact Mods and Arcanes, as well as other resources from Marie’s store (learn more in “La Cathėdrale & The Devil’s Triad” section).

The following three resources (Lyroic Bridge, Ren Hypercore and Ascaris Prime) are all used for the same purposes: 

  • Currency to purchase Tektolyst Artifact weapons from Marie (learn more in the “Focus School Expansion” section). 
  • Upgrade the new Tauron Focus Nodes (learn more in the “Focus School Expansion” section).

In addition to their individual methods of acquisition via The Perita Rebellion, 75 of each are also rewarded from completing The Old Peace Quest. The Tektolyst Artifact Acquisition Pack (one-time purchase) is also available for purchase in the Market and contains 150 of each – which is the exact amount of resources required to acquire one Tektolyst Artifact weapon from Marie. 

Lyroic Bridge — A delicate paraneural interface allowing a duly evolved Sentient pilot to command the colossal Hunhullus as if it were a second skin.  

  • Earned from Recall: Hunhullus missions in The Perita Rebellion.

 


Ren Hypercore — The evolved core of a Dactolyst, bearing its true self-given name and identity. When deprived of Tau pollen, the core becomes susceptible to forcible reprogramming.

  • Earned from Recall: Dactolyst missions in The Perita Rebellion.

 

Ascaris Prime — Technology developed by Executor Ballas to allow remote piloting of a hijacked Warframe for short periods, forcing them to act against even their deepest instincts.

  • Earned from Recall: Vanguard missions in The Perita Rebellion.
     

Image Description: Screenshot of the inside La Cathėdrale, with its many pillars and archways. Lyon (Harrow’s Protoframe) is at the center raised platform, Marie (Wisp’s Protoframe) is to the far right praying, and Roathe (Uriel’s Protoframe) is sitting to the far right. 

LA CATHÉDRALE & THE DEVIL’S TRIAD

Completing The Old Peace Quest will unlock a new area in the Sanctum Anatomica - La Cathédrale!  You can enter via portal that has appeared in the Sanctum Anatomica – on the other side resides The Devil’s Triad. In order to enter, you must have the Drifter selected.

Image Description: Marie Leroux stares at a portal in the Sanctum Anatomica that leads to La Cathédrale. Golden and orange energy swirl within the portal almost reminiscent of a mini sun.

You can also fast travel to this new area from the pause menu and quick access wheel while in the Sanctum Anatomica. 

Here you will meet and interact with The Devil’s Triad, who offer much in the way of goods and services.

You can also speak to these new Protoframes via the KIM system to learn more about them – learn more in the dedicated “Kinemantik Messaging System Expansion” section. Their Gemini Skins can also be purchased in the Market! Learn more in the “Market Additions” section. 

Image Description: Marie Leroux waits with a soft ethereal glow in La Cathédrale. On either side of her are several lit candles. 

 

Marie Leroux 

A nun determined to serve Sol by proving that even the most unrepentant devil can be redeemed. Wisp’s Protoframe! 

Marie is your access point to retrieving Tektolyst Artifacts, Focus School weapons with immense power that are key to unlocking Tauron Strikes and new Focus School upgrades. Get all the details from the dedicated “Focus School Expansion” section. 

She also has a rotating store (resets daily at 00:00 UTC) where you can trade resources earned from The Perita Rebellion for the following: 

  • Tektolyst upgrades (Mods and Arcanes)  
    • Learn more in the dedicated “Focus School Expansion” section
  • New resources from Descendia and The Perita Rebellion (1 per customer per day)  

Image Description: Lyon Allard appears deep in thought with his hands pressed firmly against his table in La Cathédrale. Littered around the table are candles, tomes, and the chain of his thurible can be seen in the center. 

 

Lyon Allard

A priest of Lua tormented by nightmarish visions. Harrow’s Protoframe! 

Lyon is reserved upon first meeting, a man of few words indeed. You’ll have to earn his trust through Marie in the KIM system before he opens up and grants you access to his Decorations Shop. Learn more in the dedicated “Kinemantik Messaging System Expansion: The Devil’s Triad” section. 

Once you meet the requirements to unlock his Decorations Shop, Orokin and Tauron-themed Decorations will be available to acquire with resources acquired from The Perita Rebellion (resets daily at 00:00 UTC). La Cathédrale Captura Scene can also be acquired here. 

Image Description: Roathe sits in his corner of La Cathédrale engrossed by a book with a soft orange glow. Behind him are numerous books, candles, and instruments. 


Roathe

Grand Carnus Roathe, the Heretic of Xata. Uriel’s Protoframe! 

Browse his Surplus to trade Maphica (unless specified otherwise) for the following items: 

  • Uriel’s main and component blueprints (learn more in the  “New Warframe: Uriel” section) 
  • New weapons’ main and component blueprints (learn more in the dedicated “New Weapons” section):
    • Vinquibus
